solutions.solution: In every next element 1, 2, 3 and 4 L's are added, respectively to the previous term. L +1L→LL +2L→LLLL +3L→LLLLLLL +4L→LLLLLLLLLLL ∴ ? = LLLLLLLLLLL

According to the following pattern From 1st to 2nd element, one M is added → MMNO From 2nd to 3rd element, one N is added → MMNNO From 3rd to 4th element, one O is added → MMNNOO From 4th to 5th element, one M is added → MMMNNOO ∴ Required element = MMMNNOO

The sequence will be as follows mm OO qq SS uu +2 +2 +2 +2 Here, the letters occur in pairs and are written small and capital in alternate manner and in every next term, the letters move two positions forward from the previous term.
Here, the pattern of series is as follows Small letters bC cD dE eF fG Capital letters +1 +1 +1 +1 +1 ∴ Required term = fG
